3276790.name: Slitherise Demo
3276790.description:
A physics 2D action game where you guide a snake with your mouse and climb a mysterious world.

"While clicking, the snake moves in the direction of the mouse cursor"

That's all there is to it! You don't have to memorize operations or rules.

However, the snake's behavior is unique and it is difficult to manipulate it as expected.

Various gimmicks await you along the way.

There is a collectible element, a story.

The story is revealed by collecting fragments of the past on the way up.
